calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ISEF-001 harm-gradient warm-start gate (instrument fix; supersedes V3-EXQ-575)
items.note: failure_autopsy_EXQ-575_2026-05-17: V3-EXQ-575 C2 FAIL was a measurement_artifact (get_statistics active_centers = 32-slot ring-buffer saturation counter blind to harm intensity). 575a swaps to GAP-6 get_coverage_telemetry residue_coverage_pct + secondary harm_total/mean_weight. Diagnostic claim_ids=[]; gates downstream ARC-065 / Q-043/044/045 / INV-049 (DEV-NEED-029).

items.title: SP-CEM main-path default-wiring validation (3-arm equivalence)
items.note: implement-substrate validation for the 2026-05-17 SP-CEM MAIN-PATH DEFAULT landing (HippocampalConfig + REEConfig.from_dims defaults flipped to use_support_preserving_cem=True/stratified_elites=True/ao_std_floor=0.2). DIAGNOSTIC, claim_ids=[] -- excluded from governance scoring; validates the WIRING, not the substrate (substrate already validated by V3-EXQ-567 PASS). 3-arm: ARM_default (no flags, relies on new defaults) / ARM_explicit_on (EXQ-567 ARM_1 flags) / ARM_explicit_off (legacy opt-out). P1 = ARM_default == ARM_explicit_on within 1e-9 + exact dict match per matched seed (wiring equivalence); P2 = ARM_default selected_action_class_entropy > ARM_explicit_off + 0.05 AND candidate_unique_first_action_classes_mean >= 2 (EXQ-567 ARM_1-vs-ARM_0 effect reproduced with zero flags). Env/harness/metrics mirror V3-EXQ-567. P1 FAIL -> from_dims pass-through audit; P1 PASS+P2 FAIL -> defaults not reaching the gate. Dry-run PASS (both criteria True).
